full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Identifying baselines and their limitations as presented in the paper
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: For Task 1.3: What the Paper Claims to Improve. Identify the main baselines (SVM-RBF, DBN-3), explain what limitations the paper identifies in these baselines, how the proposed arc-cosine kernel / MKM method overcomes them, and infer one scenario where the proposed method would NOT outperform the baselines.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Structured the response around the shallow-vs-deep tradeoff, identified the specific baselines from Larochelle et al. [11], and provided an analytical failure scenario based on the lack of spatial invariances.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified baseline error rates against Figures 2-5 in the paper. Confirmed the 24.04% SVM-RBF and 22.50% DBN-3 values for rectangles-image. Checked the authors' own acknowledgment about spatial invariances in Section 4.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Identify baselines, their limitations, how arc-cosine kernels overcome them, and one failure scenario for the proposed method.
top_5_prompts.why_important: Single comprehensive prompt that generated the complete Task 1.3 response covering all required sub-points.

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file contains a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for Task 1.3 of Part B.
